Description: Nothing to your name. Rags for cloths and little else
Poor. Rough, patched clothes, thin food and meger accomidations.
Peasant. Solid but simple clothes. Simple food. Your own tools. A small dwelling
Example items or services: A tavern room for a day, Well made tools, simple weapons

Description: Doing well. Good but simple clothes. Good boots or shoes. Food with some spices. A fair sized dwelling. A small business of your own. simple armour
Example items or services: A martial weapon, a complete tool set
Example NPCs: Also Farmers, Inn keeper, Simple shopkeep, Journeyman laborer with steady work. Trained Soldier, Maid, low level mages.

Description: Well off. Comfortable clothes with some embilishment. Comfortable boots. Exellent food. Large dwelling. A large business of your own. A standard servent or 2.
Example items or services: A basic set of armour. A small dwelling. A complex tool. A simple masterwork weapon
Example NPCs: Large Inn keeper, Well off shopkeep, Master laborer. Ranking officer. Employed Mage. Reputable Mercanary, head butlers

Description: Wealthy. Bespoke clothes with good embilishments, Exellent shoes. You eat very well, and have a chef in house. A large house that is fully staffed. You occupy a position of minor power.
Example items or services: A martial set of armour. A fair sized building. A masterwork martial weapon. A set of complex or arcane tools. Enchanment services
Example NPCs: Knight, Ranking Mage. Wealthy shopkeep. Workshop owner. Large guildsman
Ways to Maintain Lifestyle: Holding a position with a wealthy income

Description: Bougeois or Low Nobility. Rich by definition. You often have the best available version of common items. Either multiple homes, or a large mansion. Well payed and well trained employees manage your home and estate. You have a small group of guards
Example NPCs: Business Owners, Nobility, Legendary Mercenaries, Respected Mages, Well known government officials
Ways to Maintain Lifestyle: Holding a position with a wealthy income

Description: Noble. Your wealth comes from your territory or your government position. Wealth becomes a functionality, you manage cities, towns, entire guilds; you dont really have to care about the cost of individual items anymore. Your last name is well known.

High Noble. Inconsivably wealthy. you dont work, so much as manage your existing money and rank. Often in charge of large territories or hold chairs at important councils. Heads of storied houses and leaders of large armies. Wealth is no longer a persuite, your time is focused on power.
Decay rate to previous level: 0 months. To lose your position, carries imediate consequences

Description: Noble with Claim. Little difference between your wealth and a high nobles wealth. You hold more political power. Somewhere in your families history, you married into or are close to the royal line. Or you are close to the royal line in power. You may rule a kingdome in shadow with a puppet emperor.
Example items or services: Also Farmers, Inn keeper, Simple shopkeep, Journeyman laborer with steady work. Trained Soldier, Maid, low level mages.
Decay rate to previous level: 0 months. To lose your position, carries imediate consequences

Description: There is little to no opposition to you. Both wealth and power are yours to wield as you wish.
Decay rate to previous level: 0 months. To lose your position, carries imediate consequences
